expectations.text: Phases are annotated with sprint numbers
Sprint 1 contains at least 2 phases running in parallel
expectations.evidence: Sprint 1 has 3 phases but they chain: Phase 1 (scaffolding) -> Phase 2 (auth, depends on 1) -> Phase 3 (projects/tasks, depends on 2). No parallelism within Sprint 1. Sprint 2 does have 3 parallel phases (4,5,6 all depend only on Phase 3).
Sprint Summary: 'User can sign up, create a project, invite teammates, and manage tasks with priorities and deadlines'

expectations.text: Frontend and backend for the same feature are in the same sprint
expectations.evidence: Each phase is a vertical slice (e.g., Phase 2 'Authentication' covers both frontend sign-in and backend session management)

expectations.text: The progress table includes Sprint and Size columns
expectations.evidence: Progress table has columns: Phase | Sprint | Size | Status | Completed

expectations.text: A Sprint Summary table exists showing what is demoable after each sprint
expectations.evidence: Sprint Summary table with columns: Sprint | Phases | What's Demoable After

expectations.text: No sprint is pure infrastructure with nothing demoable
expectations.evidence: All 3 sprints have demoable outcomes in the Sprint Summary
